    - "Visually representing global store locations or the geographical origins of precious metals and gemstones, adding a story of global craftsmanship and exclusivity to the brand narrative."
    - "Colors and typography to match Vault Maison palette"
  ai_instructions: |
    To modify this component:
    1. Install via: pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @magicui/dotted-map
    2. Description: A component that renders a world map made of SVG dots. It can be customized with markers to highlight specific locations, making it useful for visualizing geographical data.
    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5
    4. Basic Usage:
       import { DottedMap, type Marker } from "@/components/ui/dotted-map";
       
       <div className="relative h-[400px] w-full overflow-hidden rounded-xl border">
         <DottedMap />
       </div>

- name: "glare-hover.tsx"
  path: "src/components/ui/glare-hover.tsx"
  source: "magicui"
  source_url: "https://magicui.design/docs/components/glare-hover"
  npm_dependencies: ["shadcn/ui", "@magicui/glare-hover"]
  used_in_concepts: ["01-vault", "10-maison"]
  props:
    - name: "children"
      type: "React.ReactNode"
      required: true
    - name: "className"
      type: "string"
      required: true
    - name: "style"
      type: "CSSProperties"
      required: true
    - name: "background"
      type: "string"
      required: true
    - name: "color"
      type: "string"
      required: true
    - name: "opacity"
      type: "number"
      required: true
    - name: "angle"
      type: "number"
      required: true
    - name: "size"
      type: "number"
      required: true
    - name: "duration"
      type: "number"
      required: true
    - name: "playOnce"
      type: "boolean"
      required: true
    - name: "width"
      type: "string"
      required: true
    - name: "height"
      type: "string"
      required: true
  customization_points:
    - "This could be used on product cards, so that when a user hovers over a piece of jewelry, a subtle glare effect sweeps across the image, drawing attention to it and adding a dynamic, high-end feel to the browsing experience. It could also be used on hero banners or promotional sections to add a touch of interactive polish."
    - "Colors and typography to match Vault Maison palette"
  ai_instructions: |
    To modify this component:
    1. Install via: pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @magicui/glare-hover
    2. Description: A diagonal light glare on hover using a ::before gradient, CSS variables, and background-position animation—no extra global keyframes required.
    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5
    4. Basic Usage:
       import { GlareHover } from "@/registry/magicui/glare-hover";
       
       <GlareHover className="rounded-lg">
         <Card>
           <CardContent>
             <CardTitle>Hello World</CardTitle>
             <CardDescription>Hover to see the glare sweep</CardDescription>
           </CardContent>
         </Card>
       </GlareHover>

    To modify this component:

    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5
    4. Basic Usage:

         The{" "}

         </Highlighter>{" "}
         makes important{" "}
         <Highlighter action="highlight" color="#87CEFA">
           text stand out
         </Highlighter>{" "}
         effortlessly.
       </p>

This adds a dynamic and premium feel to the site, reinforcing the brand's success and desirability."

    - "This could be used as a customer support chat assistant on the website, providing instant help to customers, answering their questions about products, materials, sizing, and shipping. It could also be used to provide personalized recommendations."
    - "Colors and typography to match Vault Maison palette"
  ai_instructions: |
    To modify this component:
    1. Install via: npx shadcn@latest add https://21st.dev/r/coderislive07/ai-assistat

    2. Description: The ShirtParallaxCard is a sleek, interactive product advertising component designed for modern e-commerce or fashion websites. It features a clean content area with the product’s title, description, price, and a call-to-action button, while the shirt image sits in the top-right corner, outside the card boundary, instantly drawing attention. The shirt gently bounces with a subtle idle animation, giving the design a lively, premium feel. On hover, the entire card tilts with a parallax effect, the card itself scales down slightly with a soft shadow, and the shirt scales up and lifts forward with a stronger shadow, creating a dynamic push-pull motion that emphasizes the product.
    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5

- name: "animated-glow-card.tsx"
  path: "src/components/ui/animated-glow-card.tsx"
  source: "21st.dev"
  source_url: "https://21st.dev/community/components/easemize/animated-glow-card/default"
  npm_dependencies: []
  used_in_concepts: ["01-vault", "10-maison"]
  props: []

    - "Colors and typography to match Vault Maison palette"
  ai_instructions: |
    To modify this component:
    1. Install via: npx shadcn@latest add https://21st.dev/r/easemize/animated-glow-card
    2. Description: A React component that renders a visually striking card with an animated, glowing border effect. This component uses an SVG filter (feColorMatrix) to achieve the customizable glow, enhancing UI elements with a modern and interactive feel. It includes a CardCanvas to house the SVG filter definition and a Card component for the main content display, complete with border elements. Ideal for drawing attention to featured content, calls to action, or simply adding a touch of dynamic visual flair to your application.
    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5

- name: "credit-card-dialog.tsx"
  path: "src/components/ui/credit-card-dialog.tsx"
  source: "21st.dev"
  source_url: "https://21st.dev/community/components/ruixenui/credit-card-dialog/default"
  npm_dependencies: ["lucide-react", "framer-motion"]
  used_in_concepts: ["01-vault", "10-maison"]
  props: []
  customization_points:
    - "This component can be used in the checkout process for customers to securely enter their credit card information. It can also be used for customers to save their credit card details for future purchases, providing a convenient and seamless shopping experience."
    - "Colors and typography to match Vault Maison palette"
  ai_instructions: |
    To modify this component:
    1. Install via: npx shadcn@latest add https://21st.dev/r/ruixen.ui/credit-card-dialog
    2. Description: This CreditCardDialog component is a sleek, professional dialog built with shadcn/ui that simulates the look and feel of a modern virtual credit card. The centerpiece is a visually rich card element styled with a gradient background, chip detail, masked card number, cardholder name, and expiry date — giving it an authentic credit card aesthetic. The dialog is designed for scenarios where a user needs to activate or authenticate a digital card by entering an activation code. Smooth animations powered by Framer Motion enhance the experience, while the input and action buttons are clearly separated in a structured layout. This makes the component ideal for fintech dashboards, virtual banking apps, or SaaS platforms where a polished, trust-inspiring credit card UI is needed. It balances functionality and design, providing both an engaging user experience and a practical flow for secure actions like card activation.
    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5

- name: "neonrgbtexteffect.tsx"
  path: "src/components/ui/neonrgbtexteffect.tsx"
  source: "21st.dev"
  source_url: "https://21st.dev/community/components/Kain0127/neon-rgbtext-effect/default"
  npm_dependencies: ["None"]
  used_in_concepts: ["01-vault", "10-maison"]
  props: []
  customization_points:
    - "This component could be used for headings or promotional text on a luxury jewelry website to create a modern and eye-catching effect."
    - "Colors and typography to match Vault Maison palette"
  ai_instructions: |
    To modify this component:
    1. Install via: npx shadcn@latest add https://21st.dev/r/xubohuah/neon-rgbtext-effect
    2. Description: A neon text effect component featuring RGB channel splitting, inspired by TikTok's signature glitch aesthetic. Unlike TikTok's dynamic, bouncing RGB separation, this implementation opts for a more subtle and elegant static approach. Using WebGL shaders, it splits the text into red, green, and blue channels with slight horizontal offsets, creating a sophisticated neon glow effect through additive blending. The result is a modern, minimalist take on the glitch effect that maintains visual clarity while adding a touch of digital sophistication.
    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5

  source_url: "https://21st.dev/community/components/Scottclayton3d/music-reactive-hero-section/default"
  npm_dependencies: []
  used_in_concepts: ["01-vault", "10-maison"]
  props: []
  customization_points:
    - "This component could be used to create a highly immersive and artistic hero section for a luxury jewelry website, perhaps for a specific collection launch with a unique soundtrack. The audio-reactive nature of the component would create a memorable and high-end user experience."
    - "Colors and typography to match Vault Maison palette"
  ai_instructions: |
    To modify this component:
    1. Install via: npx shadcn@latest add https://21st.dev/r/lovesickfromthe6ix/music-reactive-hero-section
    2. Description: A modern, minimal and bold hero section with a dynamic audio reactive visualization background. Includes built in audio player with play / pause controls and beautiful post processing effects including film grain, subtle film emulation, chromatic aberration and bloom. Everything is customizable and multiple aspects, from the wave color to the film grain intensity, are reactive to the audio.
    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5

- name: "hover-play-card.tsx"
  path: "src/components/ui/hover-play-card.tsx"
  source: "21st.dev"
  source_url: "https://21st.dev/community/components/ruixenui/hover-play-card/default"
  npm_dependencies: ["lucide-react", "framer-motion"]
  used_in_concepts: ["01-vault", "10-maison"]
  props: []
  customization_points:
    - "Showcase a short video of a jewelry piece when a user hovers over the product card, highlighting its sparkle and craftsmanship."
    - "Colors and typography to match Vault Maison palette"
  ai_instructions: |
    To modify this component:
    1. Install via: npx shadcn@latest add https://21st.dev/r/ruixen.ui/hover-play-card
    2. Description: This HoverPlay Video Card component is a clean and interactive media element built with Shadcn UI. It enhances the video viewing experience by blending hover and click interactions into one intuitive design. When a user hovers over the card, the video automatically starts playing in a muted state, giving a quick preview without disrupting the browsing flow. On mouse leave, the video pauses, maintaining focus on the card. A subtle play/pause button overlay ensures users can take control — clicking the button will start or stop playback regardless of hover, and once clicked, the video continues with sound enabled. The design adapts seamlessly to both light and dark themes.
    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5

- name: "shirt-parallax-card.tsx"
  path: "src/components/ui/shirt-parallax-card.tsx"
  source: "21st.dev"
  source_url: "https://21st.dev/community/components/ruixenui/shirt-parallax-card/default"
  npm_dependencies: ["framer-motion"]
  used_in_concepts: ["01-vault", "10-maison"]
  props: []
  customization_points:
    - "This component could be used to showcase featured jewelry pieces on the homepage or in a product gallery. The parallax effect and animation would draw attention to the product and create a luxurious feel."
    - "Colors and typography to match Vault Maison palette"
  ai_instructions: |
    To modify this component:
    1. Install via: npx shadcn@latest add https://21st.dev/r/ruixen.ui/shirt-parallax-card
    2. Description: The ShirtParallaxCard is a sleek, interactive product advertising component designed for modern e-commerce or fashion websites. It features a clean content area with the product’s title, description, price, and a call-to-action button, while the shirt image sits in the top-right corner, outside the card boundary, instantly drawing attention. The shirt gently bounces with a subtle idle animation, giving the design a lively, premium feel. On hover, the entire card tilts with a parallax effect, the card itself scales down slightly with a soft shadow, and the shirt scales up and lifts forward with a stronger shadow, creating a dynamic push-pull motion that emphasizes the product. This combination of smooth 3D interactions, motion design, and layered layout makes the component ideal for highlighting featured products, running promotional ads, or enhancing landing pages with a visually rich, engaging showcase.
    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5

    2. Description: This CreditCardDialog component is a sleek, professional dialog built with shadcn/ui that simulates the look and feel of a modern virtual credit card. The centerpiece is a visually rich card element styled with a gradient background, chip detail, masked card number, cardholder name, and expiry date — giving it an authentic credit card aesthetic. The dialog is designed for scenarios where a user needs to activate or authenticate a digital card by entering an activation code. Smooth animations powered by Framer Motion enhance the experience, while the input and action buttons are clearly separated in a structured layout. This makes the component ideal for fintech dashboards, virtual banking apps, or SaaS platforms where a polished, trust-inspiring credit card UI is needed. It balances functionality and design, providing both an engaging user experience and a practical flow for secure actions like card activation.
    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5

The text 'bubbles up' from the surface based on mouse proximity, with smooth animations and automatic light/dark theme support. Features 3D displacement shaders, crisp SVG text rendering, and responsive design. Perfect for modern, interactive hero sections.
    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5

- name: "shirt-parallax-card.tsx"
  path: "src/components/ui/shirt-parallax-card.tsx"
  source: "21st.dev"
  source_url: "https://21st.dev/community/components/ruixenui/shirt-parallax-card/default"
  npm_dependencies: ["framer-motion"]
  used_in_concepts: ["01-vault", "10-maison"]
  props: []
  customization_points:
    - "This component can be used to create an interactive and visually appealing showcase for featured jewelry pieces on a luxury website. The parallax effect and animations can highlight the craftsmanship and detail of each item."
    - "Colors and typography to match Vault Maison palette"
  ai_instructions: |
    To modify this component:
    1. Install via: npx shadcn@latest add https://21st.dev/r/ruixen.ui/shirt-parallax-card
    2. Description: The ShirtParallaxCard is a sleek, interactive product advertising component designed for modern e-commerce or fashion websites. It features a clean content area with the product’s title, description, price, and a call-to-action button, while the shirt image sits in the top-right corner, outside the card boundary, instantly drawing attention. The shirt gently bounces with a subtle idle animation, giving the design a lively, premium feel. On hover, the entire card tilts with a parallax effect, the card itself scales down slightly with a soft shadow, and the shirt scales up and lifts forward with a stronger shadow, creating a dynamic push-pull motion that emphasizes the product. This combination of smooth 3D interactions, motion design, and layered layout makes the component ideal for highlighting featured products, running promotional ads, or enhancing landing pages with a visually rich, engaging showcase.
    3. Luxury Relevance: 4/5
